swap.title.description: Title of the NFSC swap/top-up dialog. Keep the 'NFSC' token name untranslated.

swap.chargingWallet.description: Label above the wallet address that will be charged/credited in the NFSC swap dialog.

swap.network.description: Label for the blockchain network selector in the NFSC swap dialog.

swap.switchingNetwork.description: Status text shown while the wallet is switching blockchain networks.

swap.selectNetwork.description: Placeholder shown when no blockchain network is selected yet.

swap.unknownNetwork.description: Fallback label when the selected network's name is unknown.

swap.pendingTopUps.description: Heading above the list of in-flight NFSC top-ups for the current wallet.

swap.payWithEth.description: Tab label for paying with ETH in the NFSC swap dialog. Keep 'ETH' untranslated.

swap.payWithCard.description: Tab label for paying with a credit card in the NFSC swap dialog.

swap.youPayExcludingGas.description: Label above the ETH amount input the user pays, noting gas fees are excluded.

swap.youReceive.description: Label above the NFSC amount the user will receive in the swap dialog.

swap.ethBalance.description: Shows the user's ETH balance. {amount} is a pre-formatted number; keep 'ETH' untranslated.

swap.nfscBalance.description: Shows the user's NFSC balance. {amount} is a pre-formatted number; keep 'NFSC' untranslated.

swap.insufficientBalanceInline.description: Inline note appended next to the ETH balance when it is too low to cover the swap.

swap.rate.description: Label for the exchange-rate row in the swap dialog.

swap.rateValue.description: Exchange rate value. {rate} is a pre-formatted number; keep 'ETH' and 'NFSC' untranslated.

swap.gasFee.description: Label for the gas/network fee row in the swap dialog.

swap.estimatingGasFee.description: Status text shown while the gas fee is being estimated.

swap.submittedToastTitle.description: Toast title shown when the NFSC swap transaction is submitted to the network.

swap.submittedToastDescription.description: Toast body after submitting a swap. {payAmount} and {receiveAmount} are pre-formatted numbers; keep 'ETH' and 'NFSC' untranslated.

swap.genericError.description: Fallback error message when an NFSC swap fails without a specific reason.

swap.networkSwitchedToastTitle.description: Toast title shown after the wallet successfully switches blockchain networks.

swap.networkSwitchedToastDescription.description: Toast body after switching networks. {network} is the network name.

swap.networkSwitchFailedToastTitle.description: Toast title shown when switching blockchain networks fails.

swap.insufficientEthError.description: Error shown when the user's ETH balance is too low to perform the swap. Keep 'ETH' untranslated.

swap.invalidAmountError.description: Error shown when the entered swap amount is not a valid number.

swap.transactionFailedError.description: Fallback error shown when the swap transaction fails.

swap.button.connectWallet.description: Primary swap button label prompting the user to connect their wallet.

swap.button.connectingWallet.description: Primary swap button label shown while a wallet connection is in progress.

swap.button.insufficientEthBalance.description: Primary swap button label when ETH balance is too low. Keep 'ETH' untranslated.

swap.button.enterAmount.description: Primary swap button label prompting the user to enter an amount.

swap.button.swapTokens.description: Primary swap button label when the swap is ready to submit.

topup.connectWalletPrompt.description: Message prompting the user to connect or select a wallet before topping up NFSC. Keep 'NFSC' untranslated.

topup.youPayWithCard.description: Label above the USD amount input when paying for NFSC with a card.

topup.youReceive.description: Label above the NFSC amount the user will receive when topping up with a card.

topup.rateUsdToNfsc.description: Exchange rate note for card top-ups. Keep 'USD' and 'NFSC' untranslated.

topup.changeAmount.description: Back link to return to the amount-entry step in the card top-up flow.

topup.youPay.description: Label for the amount-due row in the card top-up summary.

topup.youPaySummary.description: Card top-up summary. {usdAmount} and {nfscAmount} are pre-formatted numbers; keep the leading '$' and 'NFSC' untranslated.

topup.startingTopUp.description: Loading text shown while the card top-up is being started.

topup.processingTopUp.description: Loading text shown while the card top-up is being processed.

topup.continueToPayment.description: Button label to proceed to the card payment step.

topup.enterAmount.description: Button label prompting the user to enter a top-up amount before continuing.

topup.enterMinAmountError.description: Error shown when the entered top-up amount is below the $1.00 minimum.

topup.selectNetworkError.description: Error shown when the user must pick a blockchain network before topping up.

topup.noRecipientWalletError.description: Error shown when no recipient wallet is available for the NFSC top-up.

topup.initPaymentError.description: Error shown when the card payment session fails to initialize.

topup.startTopUpError.description: Fallback error shown when starting the NFSC card top-up fails.

topup.completeToastTitle.description: Toast title shown when an NFSC card top-up completes successfully. Keep 'NFSC' untranslated.

topup.completeToastDescription.description: Toast body after a successful card top-up. {amount} is a pre-formatted number; keep 'NFSC' untranslated.

topup.incompleteToastTitle.description: Toast title shown when an NFSC card top-up did not complete. Keep 'NFSC' untranslated.

topup.incompleteToastFallback.description: Fallback toast body when a card top-up fails without a specific error message.

wallet.balanceLabel.description: Label for the total NFSC balance on the wallet card. Keep 'NFSC' untranslated.

wallet.chainBalanceLabel.description: Label for a single chain's NFSC balance on the wallet card. {chainName} is the network name.

wallet.clickForDetails.description: Hint inviting the user to open the wallet balance details modal.

wallet.detailsTitle.description: Title of the wallet details modal showing balance breakdown and recent orders.

wallet.ordersTab.description: Tab label for the recent NFSC orders list in the wallet details modal. Keep 'NFSC' untranslated.

wallet.totalBalance.description: Heading for the total NFSC balance in the wallet details modal. Keep 'NFSC' untranslated.

wallet.ordersDescription.description: Explanatory note in the wallet details modal about which orders are listed. Keep 'NFSC' untranslated.

wallet.noOrders.description: Empty-state message when a wallet has no NFSC top-up orders yet. Keep 'NFSC' untranslated.

bulkMint.title.description: Title of the admin bulk-mint NFSC dialog. Keep 'NFSC' untranslated.

bulkMint.chainLabel.description: Label for the blockchain network selector in the bulk-mint dialog.

bulkMint.chainBase.description: Network name for the Base chain option. Keep the network name 'Base' verbatim.

bulkMint.chainSepolia.description: Network name for the Sepolia testnet option. Keep the network name 'Sepolia' verbatim.

bulkMint.chainMainnet.description: Network name for the Ethereum Mainnet option. Keep the network name 'Mainnet' verbatim.

bulkMint.reasonLabel.description: Label for the required reason input in the bulk-mint dialog.

bulkMint.reasonPlaceholder.description: Placeholder example text for the reason input in the bulk-mint dialog.

bulkMint.csvInput.description: Label for the CSV paste textarea in the bulk-mint dialog. Keep 'CSV' untranslated.

bulkMint.appendToTable.description: Button that parses the pasted CSV and appends rows to the recipients table.

bulkMint.addRow.description: Button that adds one empty recipient row to the table.

bulkMint.walletAddress.description: Column header for the recipient wallet address in the bulk-mint table.

bulkMint.memo.description: Column header for the optional per-recipient memo in the bulk-mint table.

bulkMint.invalidWalletAddress.description: Inline validation error shown when a recipient wallet address is malformed.

bulkMint.duplicateAddress.description: Inline validation error shown when a recipient wallet address is duplicated.

bulkMint.memoPlaceholder.description: Placeholder for the optional memo input in a bulk-mint recipient row.

bulkMint.confirmTitle.description: Title of the confirmation dialog before submitting the bulk NFSC mint. Keep 'NFSC' untranslated.

bulkMint.back.description: Button to go back from the bulk-mint confirmation dialog to the edit step.

recentWorkflows.timeRange.description: Label for the time-range filter on the recent mint workflows table.

recentWorkflows.detailsTitle.description: Title of the workflow details modal.

recentWorkflows.workflowId.description: Label/column header for a workflow's unique ID.

recentWorkflows.runId.description: Label for a workflow run's unique ID in the details modal.

recentWorkflows.status.description: Column header for the workflow status.

recentWorkflows.workflowType.description: Label for the workflow type in the details modal.

recentWorkflows.memoData.description: Heading above the workflow memo JSON in the details modal.

recentWorkflows.searchAttributes.description: Heading above the workflow search-attributes JSON in the details modal.
